name: Chili Bean Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans.
2. Drain and rinse well.
3. Bring to boil in fresh water and boil fast for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat and cook for 40 minutes, depending upon the freshness of the beans. Older beans will take longer to cook.
5. Drain, reserving the liquid for stock later.
6. Heat olive oil in a large pot; gently fry onion and garlic for a few minutes.
7. Add chopped vegetables, cooked beans, basil, and spices. Stir well and cook for 5 minutes.
8. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, bulgur wheat, and 1 pint of the stock. Bring to a boil, cover the pot, reduce heat, and simmer gently for 30 minutes.
9. Add lemon juice and the rest of the seasonings.
10. Add more stock if necessary.
11. Cook for a further 20 minutes.
12. Serve.
Use a mixture of carrots, bell peppers, celery
+ Either fresh or canned tomatoes will work
++ You can omit the wine or substitute with a little tomato juice or extra stock
+++ If you can't get bulgur wheat, try using brown rice
